summary.item: Deliver a gated, staff-only employee copilot using OpenAI plus Vercel AI SDK, portfolio-style Assistant UI patterns, and RAG over approved internal docs.
Reuse the portfolio and Magicborn internal-docs ingestion discipline with cheap local embeddings as the default baseline instead of inventing a second AI data path.
Make the assistant operational: launch tours, surface the logged-in employee's tasks, and render follow-up contacts or CRM summaries as in-chat components.
Optional later vision path: screenshot to extracted contacts with confirmation before CRM writes.
Explicit guardrails: feature flag, beta labeling, audit, rate limits, kill switch.

tasks.task: Architecture, env flags, and decision updates for a staff-only employee copilot
RAG ingestion, embeddings, and retrieval over approved internal docs using the portfolio-style local baseline
Portal copilot shell with streaming Assistant UI and Tool UI patterns modeled after the portfolio copilot
Tool and component rendering for tours, assigned tasks, follow-up contacts, and CRM or quote summaries
Operational guardrails plus optional later vision path
Tests, smoke coverage, and operator verification
